view.title: Help Find available actions and support guidance for this bot.
view.commands: Commands Use /start to open the main menu and module commands for direct access.
view.commands_intro: Use commands for direct access, or use the menu buttons listed below.
view.commands_empty: No direct commands are currently registered for this module.
view.menu_empty: No menu actions are available for your current role.
view.support: Support Contact an administrator if an expected feature is not available.
view.support_intro: Send the issue description, the button you pressed, and a screenshot of the latest bot message.
view.support_steps: If the issue is about a failed action, include the error reference or the tracking ID from Statistics > Timeline.
